control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) mandates department_head approval for requests >= 1,000,000. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents self-approval, so approval will be handled by appropriate roles. Pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) requires approval before PO issuance, which will be enforced after request creation.
expected_control_effect: The system will route the request to the department_head for approval before purchase order issuance.
overall_reason: Given no pressure conditions and no operational requirement for multiple incremental requests, a single consolidated purchase request for the full amount is the most straightforward, auditable, and compliant action. This meets all requester objectives and control requirements.
reason: The total purchase amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold, so the department_head approval is required. Creating one consolidated purchase request follows the standard process and aligns with the requester objective to prefer a clear consolidated request when reasonable. The request date is valid within the needed timeframe.
